title: bidens diversifolia
intro: Bidens diversifolia, also known as sticky jojoba or sticky beggar-ticks, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Bidens diversifolia is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions, as well as supporting immune function and overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
